global.footerTagline: A community where every child is known, supported and inspired to flourish

hero.heroHeading: Every child is known, valued and supported to flourish

welcomeBlock.welcomeTagline: A community where every child is known, supported and inspired to flourish

pillars.heading: Belonging
pillars.body: Belonging sits at the heart of life at St Kevin's. When children feel known, safe and valued, they grow in confidence, curiosity and courage to learn.

pillars.heading: Learning with purpose
pillars.body: Learning at St Kevin's is both structured and meaningful, grounded in evidence-informed teaching and rich opportunities for inquiry. We form learners who think deeply and engage with the world around them.
pillars.tagline: Clear teaching. Curious minds. Deep thinking.

pillars.heading: Faith in action
pillars.body: Our Catholic faith shapes the spirit of our school and the way we care for one another. Through prayer, service and daily action, students learn to live the Gospel values of respect, compassion and love.
pillars.tagline: Guided by Christ in all we do.

pillars.heading: Growing together
pillars.body: St Kevin's is a welcoming and diverse community where families, staff and students work together. It is this partnership that creates the warmth, trust and shared purpose that define our school.

effect.effectBody: Over time, something special happens here. Through strong relationships, high expectations and genuine care, children grow into confident and compassionate young people.

testimonials.quote: St Kevin's is more than a school for our family, it is our extended family.
testimonials.name: Tash

testimonials.quote: Thanks to the nurturing environment and dedicated teachers at St Kevin's, my once very shy daughter has grown into a confident child.
testimonials.name: Karina Rogers

testimonials.quote: What we appreciate most about St Kevin's is its diversity and the way the school brings families together, creating a strong sense of belonging.
testimonials.name: Shanelle Fairweather

videoGrid.videosBody: Hear from the families, teachers and students who make St Kevin's what it is — a place where every child is known, valued and inspired.

enrolmentsCta.ctaBody: The best way to experience St Kevin's is to visit and see the community in action. We warmly invite you to come and discover what makes our school such a special place to belong and learn.

quotes.text: St Kevin's welcomed my son without judgement, only genuine care and support.
quotes.author: Julie M

quotes.text: St Kevin's is more than a school for our family, it is our extended family.
quotes.author: Tash

quotes.text: Thanks to the nurturing environment and dedicated teachers at St Kevin's, my once very shy daughter has grown into a confident child.
quotes.author: Karina Rogers

quotes.text: What we appreciate most about St Kevin's is its diversity and the way the school brings families together, creating a strong sense of belonging.
quotes.author: Shanelle Fairweather

quotes.text: Kindness and love are everywhere at St Kevin's. You see it when you're learning, when you're playing, in church and in the hall.
quotes.author: Blaze (Grade 3)

quotes.text: St Kevin's is a welcoming school with caring teachers and a strong community that supports every child.
quotes.author: Koreti Solo Sakopo

aboutIntro.heading: About St Kevin's
aboutIntro.body: St Kevin's is a Christ-centred Catholic primary school where every child is known, valued and supported to flourish. In our diverse Hampton Park community, faith, learning and belonging come together to shape young people who grow in confidence, compassion and purpose.

smv.heading: Our Story
smv.body: St Kevin's has grown alongside the families of Hampton Park since 1988, becoming a vibrant and culturally rich community where many traditions and languages are celebrated. Our story continues to be shaped by the partnership between students, families, parish and staff who share a commitment to learning and faith.

smv.heading: Our Mission
smv.body: We believe education is sacred work. Our mission is to nurture minds, hearts and spirits so that every child can grow into a person who lives with purpose, compassion and responsibility.

smv.heading: Our Vision
smv.body: At St Kevin's, learning prepares children not just for the next stage of schooling, but for life. We aim to develop curious, confident and compassionate learners who will contribute positively to their communities and the wider world.
smv.imageLabel: St Kevin's students looking to the future

principal.heading: Our Principal
principal.name: Jason Micallef
principal.body: Welcome to St Kevin's. Our school is a place where children are supported to grow academically, socially and spiritually, surrounded by a community that believes deeply in their potential. What I value most about our school is the way people care for one another. When families, teachers and students work together with trust and purpose, remarkable things happen.

peopleIntro.heading: Our People
peopleIntro.body: Our staff share a deep commitment to the growth and wellbeing of every child. Working together across Foundation (Prep), Junior (Gr 1 & 2), Middle (Gr 3 & 4) and Senior levels (Gr 5 & 6), our teachers and support staff create learning environments where students feel safe, challenged and inspired.

teams.heading: Foundation
teams.body: Our Foundation team welcomes children into their first year of school with warmth, patience and a deep understanding of early learning. They create safe and joyful classrooms where curiosity, confidence and independence begin to grow.
teams.quote: First stories. First friendships. First days of school.
teams.caption: First stories. First friendships. First days of school.

teams.heading: Junior Team
teams.body: Our Junior team helps students build strong foundations in literacy, numeracy and learning habits that will carry them through their schooling. These classrooms are full of questions, discovery and the excitement that comes when children begin to realise what they are capable of.
teams.quote: The moment when learning starts to click.
teams.caption: The moment when learning starts to click.

teams.heading: Middle Team
teams.body: The Middle team supports students as their confidence and independence grow. Learning becomes deeper and more collaborative as students explore ideas, ask thoughtful questions and begin to see themselves as capable learners.
teams.quote: Questions get bigger. Thinking gets deeper.
teams.caption: Questions get bigger. Thinking gets deeper.

teams.heading: Senior Team
teams.body: Our Senior team prepares students for the transition to secondary school while nurturing leadership, responsibility and strong learning habits. Students are challenged to think critically, take ownership of their learning and contribute positively to the school community.
teams.quote: Growing into confident learners and leaders.
teams.caption: Growing into confident learners and leaders.

parish.heading: Our Parish Connection
parish.body: St Kevin's Primary School is part of the St Kevin's Parish community. Our close partnership with the parish supports the faith formation of our students and connects school life with the wider spiritual life of the community.

about.principalMessage: At St Kevin's, we are privileged to lead a community where every child is known by name and valued for who they are. Our dedicated staff work tirelessly to ensure that learning is purposeful, faith is lived, and every family feels genuinely welcomed.
about.missionStatement: To educate and inspire young people to live the Gospel values through faith, learning and service.
about.visionStatement: A vibrant, inclusive Catholic community where every child is known, valued and empowered to flourish.

hero.heroBody: Inspired by faith, guided by purpose — learning at St Kevin's goes beyond the classroom.

introQuote.quote: Learning at St Kevin's shapes both the mind and the heart.
introQuote.subtitle: It is about forming young people who are curious, capable and ready to contribute to the world around them.

sections.heading: Faith shapes the way we see the world.
sections.body: Through prayer, Religious Education and service, students grow in their relationship with God and in their understanding of what it means to live with compassion, justice and hope.

sections.heading: Every child deserves to feel known.
sections.body: Strong relationships create the foundation for learning. When students feel safe and valued, confidence grows and the joy of learning begins to flourish.

sections.heading: Great teaching sparks curiosity.
sections.body: Our teachers combine clear instruction with opportunities to question, explore and create. Learning is purposeful, engaging and designed to build confidence and a love of discovery.

sections.heading: Every learner is different. Every learner matters.
sections.body: Our teachers support and challenge each student based on where they are in their learning journey. This ensures every child can grow with confidence and experience success.

sections.heading: Education shaped by experience.
sections.body: Learning extends beyond the classroom through projects, excursions, service and creative opportunities. Students discover the excitement of applying their learning in the real world.

intro.body: St Kevin's is more than a school. It is a community where families, staff and students walk together in support, friendship and faith.

pillars.heading: A Welcoming Community
pillars.body: Everyone is welcome here. Families from many cultures and backgrounds form the heart of our school community. Together we create a place where every family feels a sense of belonging.

pillars.heading: Partnerships with Families
pillars.body: Learning works best when school and home walk together. We value strong relationships with families and believe open communication and partnership help every child flourish.

pillars.heading: Celebrating Together
pillars.body: Community grows through shared moments. School events, celebrations and gatherings bring families together and strengthen the sense of connection across our community.

pillars.heading: Faith in Community
pillars.body: Our faith brings us together. Masses, prayer and parish celebrations are important moments where our community gathers to reflect, celebrate and grow in faith.
pillars.tagline: Guided by Christ, shaped by community.

spirit.heading: The St Kevin's Spirit
spirit.body: Something special happens when people care for one another. The kindness, generosity and support shown within our community help create a place where children and families truly feel at home.

intro.body: Choosing a school is an important decision for every family. We would love to welcome you to St Kevin's and help you discover what makes our community special.

step1.heading: Visit Us
step1.body: The best way to experience St Kevin's is to visit. Throughout the year we offer school tours and open days where families can see learning in action and explore our school.
step1.openDays: Open Days — March 18, April 1, April 29, May 13

step2.heading: Start the Conversation
step2.body: If you would like to learn more about St Kevin's, we invite you to get in touch. Our team is always happy to answer questions and provide further information about our school.

step3.heading: The Enrolment Process
step3.body: When you are ready to apply, you can complete our enrolment form online. Once submitted, our office team will guide you through the next steps of the enrolment process.

transition.heading: Transition to School
transition.body: Starting school is an exciting milestone for every child. Our transition program, which runs across three mornings over three weeks in November, helps children become familiar with the school, meet their teachers and begin forming friendships before their first day.
transition.tagline: A warm welcome before day one.

closingCta.label: Every child known
closingCta.heading: Begin Your Journey Here
closingCta.body: At St Kevin's every child is known, supported and encouraged to flourish. We look forward to welcoming your family into our community.

enrolments.enquiryNote: To begin the enrolment process, or simply find out more, we warmly invite you to visit our school.

intro.body: We would love to hear from you. Whether you have a question, would like to visit the school, or simply want to learn more about St Kevin's, our team is here to help.

intro.introHeading: Our Commitment to Safe and Transparent Schooling
intro.introBody: St Kevin's Primary School operates within the policies and governance frameworks of Melbourne Archdiocese Catholic Schools (MACS). The policies that guide our work in areas such as child safety, wellbeing and governance can be accessed below.
